segments.speaker: 题目13/14
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. So Jennifer, how's the apartment hunting going? It's okay. I was just looking some online listings. It's tough to find something I like in my price range. I'd love to be able to walk to classes. Having to drive and park in the lot near the student union every day like I do now is kind of a hassle. I understand that. And even though it would help with rent, I don't want to live with anyone. My last roommate was so messy, it was kind of a disaster.
